use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::sync::Mutex;

// BAD: Mutex<Vec<_>> for collecting parallel results
fn find_errors(files: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<Error> {
    let errors = Mutex::new(Vec::new());

    files.par_iter().for_each(|file| {
        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file).unwrap();
        for line in content.lines() {
            if let Some(error) = check_line(line) {
                errors.lock().unwrap().push(error);
            }
        }
    });

    errors.into_inner().unwrap()
}

fn collect_metrics(data: &[DataPoint]) -> Vec<Metric> {
    let metrics = Mutex::new(Vec::new());

    data.par_iter().for_each(|point| {
        let metric = compute_metric(point);
        metrics.lock().unwrap().push(metric);
    });

    metrics.into_inner().unwrap()
}
